title: eremophila subfloccosa subsp. glandulosa
intro: Eremophila subfloccosa subsp. glandulosa, also known as the 'Glandular Emu Bush', is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Eremophila subfloccosa subsp. glandulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can contribute to overall well-being. The herbal preparations of Eremophila subfloccosa subsp. glandulosa include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
